hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: The solver must read C++ modules, run the matrix, and compare audit totals to recomputed integrals to find which invariants break under growth, collapse, and replay.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Correct output requires coordinating seam accumulation, parent-child relink after structural change, volume-weighted aggregation, vault payload composition, post-resume relink, and halo synchronization across six modules.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose
hardness_axes.reasoning: The prompt reports audit drift under structural change and replay mismatch without naming sub-face area splitting, parent-child reindex direction, volume-weighting, payload composition, or halo copy order as causes.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Fixing only the seam accumulation leaves replay broken; fixing only the vault format leaves growth and collapse cases broken; fixing only the relink leaves halo broken.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Custom flux-register, AMR topology, and vault-with-pending-pulses invariants are not a textbook drop-in library call.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: An honest public contract does not reveal internal sub-face splitting, relink direction, weighting recipe, payload layout, or halo copy order.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Six scenarios are checked, not one secret corrupt scenario.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Flipping contract spreads failures across six distinct module roots.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Tests cover identity-tier, growth, collapse-only, growth-then-collapse, replay, and halo cases.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Symptoms-only wording still leaves diagnosis to runtime and code.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Difficulty comes from invariant reasoning, not from canary and seed guards alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Core work is semantic numerical pipeline repair, not verifier-deps tuning.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single function flips a majority of tests; each of six locations controls exactly 2 of 12 tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle patches six C++ modules across six directories with substantive logic.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not solvable by one config table or seed edit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction nouns are banned from fix-path function names and parameter names.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fix symbols are opaque; three decoys rhyme structurally with fix symbols.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Standard finite-volume recipes fail on AMR seam, vault-with-pending-pulses, and replay-relink invariants together.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No security framing for hardness; difficulty is numerical invariants and persistence semantics.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Seam, relink, aggregation, payload, resume, and halo requirements interact across structural change and replay.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Shell matrix provides realism; hardness is numerical pipeline semantics across the AMR cycle.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requires tracing multi-module assembly across scenarios and a replay round-trip.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Combined AMR conservation, restart fidelity, and halo synchronization debugging is clearly hard.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Six discoveries enumerated with planned locations and why-not-reveal reasoning.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Planned instruction is symptoms-only; no algorithm names, thresholds, or fix-site disclosures.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three topologies each need three or more coordinated locations across distinct module roots.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic scripts and recomputed integrals are programmatically checkable.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Output path and audit schema field names can be stated without overspecifying internals.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: An expert AMR engineer can repair the small C++ harness in a few hours.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires professional AMR conservation debugging plus checkpoint/restart fidelity expertise.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Conservation drift after AMR + restart is a recognized HPC reliability problem.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Tests grade audit JSON values, not process.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Instruction alone does not specify sub-face area splitting at coarse-fine seams, parent-child reindex direction after structural change, volume-weighting in the aggregation, vault payload composition with pending pulses, post-resume relink, or halo copy order.

discovery_budget.discovery: Coarse-fine seam pulses must be subdivided into one sub-pulse per fine sub-face, not recorded once with the coarse area.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming sub-face subdivision discloses the seam accumulation repair.

discovery_budget.discovery: Both parent-of AND child-of arrays must be rebuilt after a structural change; rebuilding only one leaves adjacency stale.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Stating the relink direction pinpoints the topology fix.

discovery_budget.discovery: Collapsing children into a parent must use volume-weighted mean, not arithmetic mean.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming volume weighting reveals the aggregation recipe.

discovery_budget.discovery: The persistence payload must include the pending-pulse slice that has been accumulated but not yet applied.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the missing payload block discloses the serializer fix.

discovery_budget.discovery: After reading the persistence payload, topology adjacency must be rebuilt before stepping forward, and a mismatched fingerprint must be rejected.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Stating the post-resume relink and the integrity check pinpoints the resume fix.

discovery_budget.discovery: Ghost-cell payloads at refinement seams must be copied with the correct stride: one ghost per fine sub-face on the coarse side.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the stride discloses the halo copy fix.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: The instruction describes balance drift, replay divergence, and collapse-only drift as observable symptoms without naming sub-face splitting, relink direction, weighting, payload composition, post-resume relink, or halo stride.

attack_path.summary: Run matrix, compare failing scenarios to recomputed integrals, trace assembly and resume in C++ modules, coordinate seam, relink, aggregation, payload, resume, and halo repairs across six files, rebuild, re-run.
attack_path.reasoning: Requires code tracing and invariant reconstruction, not prompt transcription. The single-file or single-subsystem patch will fail at least one independent test from a distinct location.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Repair sub-face seam accumulation, parent-child relink after structural change, volume-weighted aggregation, vault payload composition with pending pulses, post-resume relink with integrity rejection, and halo copy stride across six C++ files.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Any smaller change leaves independent tests failing on balance, adjacency, conservation, replay equivalence, integrity rejection, or halo consistency from a distinct module root.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Distributed opaque roots, scenario-derived expectations, build-stamp-embedded vault signature, and no golden audit in environment.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After the honest contract, the solver must still reconstruct AMR conservation, restart fidelity, and halo synchronization invariants and coordinate fixes across six module roots while keeping every existing scenario passing.

topology_enumeration.summary: Repair the coarse-fine seam accumulation, then propagate fixes outward to vault payload composition, post-resume relink, and halo synchronization.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Seam alone passes identity-tier balance but fails replay equivalence and halo column tests; vault alone passes replay but fails balance; resume relink alone passes replay neighbor but leaves matrix balance broken.

topology_enumeration.summary: Repair the parent-child relink after structural change first, then handle aggregation, vault payload, and halo.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Relink alone passes adjacency counts but leaves balance broken; aggregation alone passes child-sum but leaves replay and halo broken.

topology_enumeration.summary: Repair the vault payload composition and post-resume relink together, then handle seam, aggregation, and halo.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Persistence pair alone passes replay equivalence but fails matrix balance, aggregation, and halo tests; seam plus aggregation alone fails replay neighbor consistency.

symbol_table.purpose: Accumulates per-edge corrections at adjacent collection seams.

symbol_table.signature: int step_n(CellGrid *a, const int *b, int c, TopoLink *d)
symbol_table.purpose: Rebuilds parent and child index relationships after the population changes.

symbol_table.signature: void fold_q(const CellPatch *a, int b, CellPatch *c)
symbol_table.purpose: Combines child payloads into a coarser cell payload.
Writes the runtime layout into the vault payload per the declared serializer ABI.
Reads a vault and reattaches cross-collection indices so the next step can run.

symbol_table.signature: void op_b(CellPatch *a, const CellPatch *b, int c, int d)
symbol_table.purpose: Synchronizes ghost payloads at the seam between adjacent collections.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Buckets per-cell values for documentation tables.
Formats stderr diagnostics not used in the audit path.
Maintains a recent-step ring buffer for verbose mode only.
